form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at Bedourie Mdn-Sw September 13 over 1000m, 3 len behind Bitta Bon Magic with 58.5kg at $4.40. Previously first up; seventh of 9 at Betoota Clb August 30 over 800m, 7 len behind Rubicon River carrying 62kg at $4. Will need this hitout.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(14). Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at Bedourie Mdn-Sw September 13 over 1000m, 3 len behind Bitta Bon Magic with 58.5kg at $4.40. Previously first up; seventh of 9 at Betoota Clb August 30 over 800m, 7 len behind Rubicon River carrying 62kg at $4. Will need this hitout.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Jockey B. Newport dropped his whip near the 400m.
Began awkwardly and as a result slow to begin. Raced wide throughout the event.
Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Mare by Pariah on debut. Ran 3rd in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Difficult gate and happy to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Mare by Pariah on debut. Ran 3rd in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Difficult gate and happy to watch this time.

form.formComment: Mare by Rebel Dane on debut. Runner-up in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Jumps from a favourable gate and keep onside.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Mare by Rebel Dane on debut. Runner-up in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Jumps from a favourable gate and keep onside.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 2nd of 11 at Mt Gambier 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 22 over 900m, 1.0 len behind Whathappensinvegas with 54kg at $8. Second run from a spell raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at Warracknabeal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Sapphire Reign with 57.5kg at $16. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 2nd of 11 at Mt Gambier 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 22 over 900m, 1.0 len behind Whathappensinvegas with 54kg at $8. Second run from a spell raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at Warracknabeal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Sapphire Reign with 57.5kg at $16. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages of the event.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months got back early 6th of 12 at Pakenham 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Invincible Lover carrying 57kg at $8. Previously second-up eased back early on 11th of 14 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Tres Magnifique carrying 56kg at $26. Will benefit from that run and is worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. Previously second-up eased back early on 11th of 14 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Tres Magnifique carrying 56kg at $26. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 500m until passing the 300m.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw November 20 over 1000m, 9 len behind Faraway Dream with 56kg at $31. On debut fourth of 7 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw November 5 over 1103m, on heavy track; 7 len behind National Code with 56kg at $21. Might be better off following this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). She is resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw November 20 over 1000m, 9 len behind Faraway Dream with 56kg at $31. On debut fourth of 7 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw November 5 over 1103m, on heavy track; 7 len behind National Code with 56kg at $21. Might be better off following this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bounded on jumping away, then knuckled and lost ground.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw November 16 over 1350m, 0.9 len behind Queen Of The Surf with 56kg at $4.80. On debut second of 7 at Ballarat 3yo F Mdn-Sw October 6 over 1000m, soft track; a head behind Angel Eyes carrying 57kg at $7.50. Has strong claims if presented on song.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Resuming. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw November 16 over 1350m, 0.9 len behind Queen Of The Surf with 56kg at $4.80. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Naracoorte 3yo+ Mdn-Sw February 8 over 1200m, 3 len behind Bel Hotesse with 55kg at $7. First up last campaign second last of 8 at Mornington 3yo F Mdn-Sw January 1 over 1000m, 4 len behind Thanks Gorgeous carrying 57kg at $19. Prefer to see how she returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Naracoorte 3yo+ Mdn-Sw February 8 over 1200m, 3 len behind Bel Hotesse with 55kg at $7. First up last campaign second last of 8 at Mornington 3yo F Mdn-Sw January 1 over 1000m, 4 len behind Thanks Gorgeous carrying 57kg at $19. Prefer to see how she returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when 3rd of 8 at Gosford F&M Mdn-Sw on July 10 over 1100m, slow going 3.5 len behind Nazwah with 55.5kg at $7. Expecting a bright start to the prep.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when 3rd of 8 at Gosford F&M Mdn-Sw on July 10 over 1100m, slow going 3.5 len behind Nazwah with 55.5kg at $7. Expecting a bright start to the prep.

form.formComment: Filly by Exceed And Excel facing the starter for the first time. Won a jump-out at Avoca on March 31. Couldn't have been more impressive in the lead-ups.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Exceed And Excel facing the starter for the first time. Won a jump-out at Avoca on March 31. Couldn't have been more impressive in the lead-ups.

form.formComment: Last start raced on the pace before fading ran last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Two To Tango with 57kg at $3.10. The race before that 3rd of 7 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1000m, head behind Absolute Power with 57kg at $2.20. Rates well and expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Last start raced on the pace before fading ran last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Two To Tango with 57kg at $3.10. The race before that 3rd of 7 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1000m, head behind Absolute Power with 57kg at $2.20. Rates well and expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 700m, steadied to avoid the heels of San Pueblo.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months set the pace for much of the race 2nd in a small field at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Celtics carrying 57kg at $1.85. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Bendigo 3yo F Mdn-Sw on August 28 over 1100m, on rain affected going; long-neck behind Eco Force with 57kg at $2.40. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Bendigo 3yo F Mdn-Sw on August 28 over 1100m, on rain affected going; long-neck behind Eco Force with 57kg at $2.40. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up over the concluding stages.
Commenced awkwardly. Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Near the 600m shifted in and brushed the running rail.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months in a small field at Yarra Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Our Yonglee carrying 57kg at $3.10. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Kyneton 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 5 over 1203m, in the wet; 0.9 len behind Asiatic with 56kg at $2.10. Should improve sharply.
